case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. SANTOS ELMER CAUICH CAUICH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT SANTOS ELMER CAUICH CAUICH IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
